pr.note: Release 0.10.3 is merged; no implementation PR is open.

publish.gap_handling: backfill report fully_verified now allows small capture/manifest skew (max(25, merged//1000)) when both sides non-zero

osf.error: OSF upload step completed, but the workflow Verify OSF mirror step failed.
osf.note: Do not claim OSF parity until a later verification run succeeds; Sigstore remains gated.

health_monitor_fix.change: doctor queries live HF/Zenodo/OSF; monitor no longer forces RECORD_COUNT=0

next_ops: Re-run Archive Health Monitor to refresh live mirror evidence
Investigate and retry OSF verification after the upload/verification mismatch
Keep Sigstore gated until production release attachment paths have passed several clean cycles
